analysis.consistency: Consistent with standard TTRPG class feature organization. It introduces the fundamental choice defining the Sorcerer's subclass path.
analysis.quality: High quality. Clearly defines the feature's purpose (choosing an origin) and scope (when subsequent features are gained: 1st, 6th, 14th, and 18th level). The link reference is appropriate for digital content.
analysis.mechanics: This feature is purely organizational; it doesn't grant immediate mechanical bonuses but sets up future mechanical progression based on the chosen origin (subclass). The level progression (1, 6, 14, 18) is standard for core class subclass features.

recommendations.detail: Ensure the link reference format `[sorcerous origin](#section-sorcerous-origins)` resolves correctly in the target environment.
